text.title: Design System Drift Dashboard Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying design-system-drift-dashboard. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Dashboard reports 95 % adoption but 4 unscanned repos still ship hardcoded values.
antipattern.fix: Scan every consumer repo; parallelise if slow.

antipattern.symptom: Adoption rises but drift accelerates because new hardcoded values keep landing.
antipattern.fix: Track BOTH; drift is the leading indicator.

antipattern.symptom: Dashboard exists for a year; nobody can say if migration is done.
antipattern.fix: Negotiate adoption + drift thresholds before first scan.

antipattern.symptom: Report generated once for a demo; never updated.
antipattern.fix: Schedule weekly CI run; persist trend ≥8 weeks.
